original_text: ### [IMPORTANT] Gradient Callout CTA Section Rule A full-width banner where a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked. **Layout (explicit):** - **Background** → the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized `cover`, `no-repeat`, centered, spanning the full content width (600px). Always set a solid `background-color` of Sunshine `#faa31b` as fallback, since clients like Outlook drop background images. - **Headline** → Brand Blue `#00529b`, centered, sitting in the **top third**, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line. - **Button** → centered, in the **lower-middle** below the headline. Fill Deep Blue `#003D74`, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold `#FFC20E` arrow `›` (24px) after two non-breaking spaces. Size 248 × 64px. **Background image:** asset is `https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png` — do not re-host or recolor. The background may be skipped **only in very, very rare cases** (plain-text/AMP fallback, a client that strips all images, a hard size budget). When skipped, the section still renders on a solid Sunshine `#faa31b` fill and every other rule stays identical. **Button radius (mandatory, never change):** `border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;` — this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape and is **always required on every instance**, even when the background is skipped. Never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals. ## MJML ```xml Talk to your doctor about how LISRAYA can help Visit LISRAYA.com  ❯ ``` If the background must be skipped, remove only `background-url`, `background-size`, `background-repeat`, and `background-position` — keep `background-color="#faa31b"` and the headline color, button color, and button radius exactly as above.

relations.note: Radius lock takes precedence over the general assembly binding as the emphasized never-change spec.
Describes the rare exception path where the background image is omitted while other assembly bindings persist.
Asset integrity constraint applies alongside the section assembly bindings.

rules.intent: Preserve the exact structural and stylistic composition of the Gradient Callout CTA banner across all instances.
rules.rule_text: The Gradient Callout CTA section is a full-width banner on the branded Sunshine gradient image (background-size cover, no-repeat, centered, 600px content width), with a solid Sunshine (#faa31b) fallback color for clients like Outlook that drop background images. The headline (Brand Blue #00529b, Nunito Sans ExtraBold, ~28px, one line) sits centered in the top third; the single centered button below it uses Deep Blue (#003D74) fill, a white Nunito Sans ExtraBold 18px label, and a Gold (#FFC20E) 24px arrow after two non-breaking spaces, with the signature asymmetric button radius (49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px).

rules.intent: Lock the signature button shape as an unchangeable brand identifier across all rendering contexts.
rules.rule_text: The Gradient Callout CTA button's signature asymmetric radius (border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px) is mandatory on every instance, including when the background image is skipped; it must never be simplified to a single value, have its corners swapped, or have its decimals rounded.

rules.intent: Ensure graceful, brand-consistent degradation when the gradient artwork cannot render, without loss of core visual identity.
rules.rule_text: The gradient background image may be omitted only in very rare cases (plain-text/AMP fallback, an image-stripping email client, or a hard size budget). When it is skipped, remove only the background-url, background-size, background-repeat, and background-position attributes from the MJML section — the solid Sunshine (#faa31b) background-color fallback, headline color, button fill/color, and the signature button radius must all remain exactly as specified.
rules.snippets: remove only `background-url`, `background-size`, `background-repeat`, and `background-position` — keep `background-color="#faa31b"` and the headline color, button color, and button radius exactly as above.
